title: Legal professionals
summary: 9084 — solicitors, barristers, legal executives, and fusion debates.
learningObjectives: Outline roles of solicitors and barristers.
Explain training routes and regulation (SRA, BSB).
Analyse rights of audience and direct access.
Evaluate fusion of professions and diversity issues.

simpleExplanation.title: Lawyers who represent you
simpleExplanation.summary: Solicitors handle clients day-to-day; barristers specialise in advocacy — reforms allow more overlap and alternative business structures.

sections.content: **Legal professionals** (1.3.2) — compare **solicitor vs barrister** roles and training.
